creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 232543
"git diff" to update the port

- update 2.51 -> 2.52
Changes: https://metacpan.org/release/DROLSKY/DateTime-TimeZone-2.52/source/Changes

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
12.2-RELEASE-p8
pkg 1.17.5
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
